title: ToolTreaux Tempered Stainless Steel Barber Scissors Hair Cut Shears 5.5 6.5 7.5"
description:
The ToolTreaux barber’s scissors are designed for both professional and personal use. They feature precision blades that will provide a long-lasting cutting edge that will not damage or cause split ends if used properly. These shears are made of ice-tempered stainless steel that is corrosion resistant so you can count on them to work whether cutting wet or dry hair. Both lightweight and compact, they will easily fit in your pocket, apron, or backpack. They come with a convenient PVC storage pouch to protect them when not in use. Our scissors feature an ergonomic finger rest to protect your hand during hair cutting. Measuring 5.5” in length, these scissors are the ideal size for use in barber shops, hair salons, and at-home hair trimming

ToolTreaux Tempered Stainless Steel Barber Scissors Hair Cut Shears 5.5 6.5 7.5"

The ToolTreaux barber’s scissors are designed for both professional and personal use. They feature precision blades that will provide a long-lasting cutting edge that will not damage or cause split ends if used properly.

Key Features

  • PROFESSIONAL BARBER’S SCISSORS - ToolTreaux hairdressing scissors are designed for both professional and personal use. Precision blades provide a long-lasting cutting edge that will not damage hair or cause split ends.
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Shears are ice-tempered stainless steel that won’t rust. Lightweight and compact, they fit easily in your backpack, pocket, or apron. Comes with a PVC carry pouch for convenient storage when not in use.
  • COMFORTABLE DESIGN - Scissors come with an ergonomic finger rest to protect your hand during cutting. Measures 5.5” in length, ideal size for barber shops, salons, and home bathroom storage.
  • VERSATILE SHEARS - Although designed for cutting and trimming hair, professional hair cutting scissors can also be used for pet grooming, trimming beards, mustaches, and fur. To keep the blades sharp, not suggested for use with paper, fabric, or other crafting materials.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: ice-tempered stainless steel, corrosion-resistant; Dimensions: 5.5” x 2.07” x .3”; Finger rest included; Color: chrome; For professional and personal use

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT75SHRS1
  • UPC: 810058487452
  • Color: Silver

These shears are made of ice-tempered stainless steel that is corrosion resistant so you can count on them to work whether cutting wet or dry hair. Both lightweight and compact, they will easily fit in your pocket, apron, or backpack. They come with a convenient PVC storage pouch to protect them when not in use.

Our scissors feature an ergonomic finger rest to protect your hand during hair cutting. Measuring 5.5” in length, these scissors are the ideal size for use in barber shops, hair salons, and at-home hair trimming.

Although these scissors were designed for cutting and trimming hair, they can also be used for pet grooming, trimming mustaches and beards, and even pet fur. To keep the blades sharp, we suggest you don’t use them with paper, fabric, or other crafting materials.
